title: Project detail handles make a tenant-scope review feel necessary
impact_summary: Predictable project handles and route parameters are a natural place to ask whether tenant scoping is enforced.
why_this_matters: IDOR-style issues are often hiding in otherwise ordinary detail routes and JSON loaders.
evidence_fixture: access review panel with resource handles, client scopes, and route anchors
suggested_patch_summary: Bind record lookups to tenant-aware scope checks and switch to opaque identifiers.
verification_summary: Verified as fixture-only with no live tenant data behind the route.
replay_regression_note: Move between project detail pages and show how the scenario stays narrative-only, not exploitable.
